name: CHIM JIA QI
tagline:
Software Engineer |
Full-stack Development, System Design & Technical Leadership

education.degree: Bachelor of Science with Honours (Information Technology) major in Artificial Intelligence

workingExperience.title: Senior Software Engineer
descriptions: Led end-to-end software development lifecycle activities including requirement gathering, solution design, development, testing, deployment, and production support.
Managed and mentored development teams while coordinating technical deliverables and project timelines.
Designed and developed scalable full-stack enterprise applications with maintainable and modular source code architecture.
Performed system engineering, server maintenance, deployment automation, and environment configuration for production systems.
Managed database design, optimization, troubleshooting, and administration to ensure system stability and performance.
Collaborated with cross-functional stakeholders to translate business requirements into reliable technical solutions.
Troubleshot complex production issues and implemented preventive improvements for operational reliability and system resilience.

workingExperience.title: Associate Consultant
descriptions: Acted as company-assigned technical consultant and delivery resource for client-facing and internal projects from initiation to completion.
Delivered on-site technical support and development as a Resident/On-site Developer, ensuring alignment with client environment, workflows, and deployment constraints.
Performed on-site data analysis and reporting support as a Data Analyst, assisting clients in extracting insights, validating datasets, and building reporting outputs.
Participated in system enhancements and continuous improvement initiatives based on client feedback and operational needs.

demoProject.title: FullStackJs Web Application
demoProject.summary: This is a demo project to proof the concept of fullstack JavaScript development. The build of project involving Vue.js with integration of Node.js and SQLite. The project is about a simple e-commerce platform with basic login and shopping functionality. Feel free to visit the link to preview the project!
